creator: mail@ozzmosis.com
text:
Created attachment 144871
Makefile and distinfo patches

Update the net/binkd port from 0.9.9 to 1.0.2. See attached patch.

- Bump PORTVERSION.

- Remove ftp://ftp.rsu.ru/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ from MASTER_SITES as it no longer responds.

- Use .tar.gz distfile instead of .zip.

- Update distinfo with new checksum.

The port still needs staging after the patch is applied.
